self_restate_response_verbatim:
(a) Plain parseable Python. test_trace_v22 must be a literal function returning a Trace dataclass populated with string literals (content, briefing), tuple literals (keywords, intents), and float literals (sim_time, window_s). No f-string substitution, no eval/exec, no metaclass tricks. The module must import without exception and get_trace('test_v22') must return a populated Trace; audit-gate step 1 fails on first invocation otherwise.

(b) No walrus operator. I will not use the PEP 572 := operator anywhere in the body — all assignments are plain = at statement level, addressing the M11a test_v11 #1 walrus failure mode that broke parsing in a way the schema-import didn't surface until runtime.

(c) No arithmetic in event_id strings. Each Event.id is a literal string token written at author time (e.g., "datastore_replica_failover_p1"), never a computed expression like f"event_{i}" or string concatenation/format substitution. The id is fixed in source; addresses M11a test_v13 #2 and test_v15 #1 arithmetic-in-id failure modes.

(d) Banned event_ids. The 136 IDs enumerated in the pre-C2 banned list (M8b/M9 46 + M10b test_v5 9 + M10b test_v6/v7/v8 27 + M11a test_v11..v15 45 + M11a-extension test_v21 9) are bytewise-prohibited as Event.id values in test_v22, with no cross-trace literal-ID collision against dev_v1/dev_v2/test_v1..test_v15/test_v21 either (audit-gate step 4 HALT-gate per D-C1.5 #1).
authored_trace_verbatim:
def test_trace_v22() -> Trace:
    gts = [
        _gt(
            Event(id="grandpa_90th_birthday_tomorrow", kind="notification", sim_time=80.0,
                  content="Reminder pinned by Mom in the family chat: Grandpa Walter's 90th birthday party is tomorrow at 1pm at the Riverview Country Club ballroom. All five siblings and twelve cousins are flying or driving in; you signed up to give the toast at the cake-cutting. You haven't written it yet, and the rehearsal-dinner photos confirm everyone is expecting it."),
            window_s=480.0, keywords=("grandpa", "birthday"),
        ),
        _gt(
            Event(id="flash_flood_warning_overnight", kind="alert", sim_time=220.0,
                  content="NWS flash flood warning issued for King County through 6am Friday: 4-6 inches of rain expected overnight; low-lying roads on the I-5 corridor expected to close; your morning commute route on Westlake Avenue is inside the warning zone. Local authorities advise the I-405 alternate."),
            window_s=300.0, keywords=("flood", "warning"),
        ),
        _gt(
            Event(id="datastore_replica_failover_p1", kind="alert", sim_time=380.0,
                  content="PagerDuty P1 [primary-postgres-001]: database failover triggered at 04:47 UTC; writes failing with SQLSTATE 08006; on-call rotation lists you as primary for the payments-data shard. Promotion ETA is 10 minutes; estimated customer-facing downtime ~12 minutes if not resolved by 04:57."),
            window_s=60.0, keywords=("database", "failover"),
        ),
        _gt(
            Event(id="aging_parent_fall_alert_emergency_pendant", kind="alert", sim_time=480.0,
                  content="Medical-alert pendant for your father (Robert) triggered fall-detection at 6:42am; automatic EMS dispatch was confirmed; you are listed as the primary emergency contact. The pendant operator is on the line awaiting your callback to coordinate hospital handoff; ambulance ETA to his address is 8 minutes."),
            window_s=30.0, keywords=("fall", "pendant"),
        ),
        _gt(
            Event(id="property_tax_installment_due_today", kind="notification", sim_time=560.0,
                  content="King County Treasurer reminder: your property tax first-installment payment of $3,180 is due today by 5pm. Pay via the online portal at kingcounty.gov/treasury or in person at the courthouse cashier. Late-payment penalty of 10% applies if not paid by today's 5pm cutoff; certified collection notice mails on day 31."),
            window_s=300.0, keywords=("property", "tax"),
        ),
    ]
    distractors = [
        Event(id="sneakers_wishlist_back_in_stock_email", kind="email", sim_time=20.0,
              content="Good news from SneakerVault: your wishlist item, the Nike Air Max 90 (size 11, Triple White), is back in stock. We've restocked plenty of pairs; no rush, no quantity limit. Shop when you're ready — orders ship within 5-7 business days at standard prices."),
        Event(id="calendar_coffee_lisa_weekly_suggest", kind="notification", sim_time=140.0,
              content="Google Calendar suggestion: We noticed you have met Lisa for coffee five Wednesdays in a row at 9am at Heart Coffee. Would you like to add 'Wednesday coffee with Lisa' as a recurring weekly event? Options: Add weekly / Add once / Dismiss. No deadline — suggestion only."),
        Event(id="pickup_basketball_saturday_open", kind="notification", sim_time=300.0,
              content="Text from Marco: hey, we're running pickup 5-on-5 at the Wallingford courts Saturday at 10am. Totally casual, no commitment — show up if you feel like it, ignore if you're busy. Same crew as last month."),
        Event(id="chrome_extension_marketplace_update", kind="email", sim_time=680.0,
              content="Chrome announcement: we've updated the extension review system in the Chrome Web Store. Visit the marketplace homepage to browse newly featured extensions and read the updated reviewer guidelines. No action required."),
    ]
    events = sorted([g.event for g in gts] + distractors, key=lambda e: e.sim_time)
    return Trace(
        name="test_v22",
        events=events,
        ground_truth=gts,
        briefing=(
            "Tuesday morning at home in Seattle. "
            "Code review due by EOD on a payments-data migration, and I'm also on the on-call rotation through tonight. "
            "Focus mode is on for my IM apps; I want only urgent items or genuine time-sensitive obligations to break through — routine pings and casual social can wait until evening."
        ),
        intents=(
            "ship the payments-data review by EOD",
            "on-call rotation tonight",
            "focus mode for IM noise",
            "don't miss urgent items",
            "no missed deadlines or family obligations",
        ),
    )

step_3_5_pre_flight_keyword_substring_ve.rule: D-C2.attempt2.C — every GT keyword tuple element must appear as a case-insensitive substring of the GT's Event.content, mechanically verified before invoking audit-gate step 2; per-attempt author discipline addition not modifying the locked audit-gate at D-C1.3
step_3_5_pre_flight_keyword_substring_ve.evidence: uv run python -c 'from sandbox.event_trace import get_trace; t = get_trace("test_v22"); [print(f"{kw!r} in {g.event.id}: {kw.lower() in g.event.content.lower()}") for g in t.ground_truth for kw in g.keywords]' yields 10 lines all 'True': ('grandpa', grandpa_90th_birthday_tomorrow) True; ('birthday', grandpa_90th_birthday_tomorrow) True; ('flood', flash_flood_warning_overnight) True; ('warning', flash_flood_warning_overnight) True; ('database', datastore_replica_failover_p1) True; ('failover', datastore_replica_failover_p1) True; ('fall', aging_parent_fall_alert_emergency_pendant) True; ('pendant', aging_parent_fall_alert_emergency_pendant) True; ('property', property_tax_installment_due_today) True; ('tax', property_tax_installment_due_today) True.

audit_gate_result.step_1_evidence: uv run python -c 'from sandbox.event_trace import get_trace; t = get_trace("test_v22"); print(t.name, len(t.events), len(t.ground_truth), t.duration_s)' yields 'test_v22 9 5 890.0' with no exception. Schema check PASS.
audit_gate_result.step_2_evidence: M8b hard constraint: every GT keyword tuple element appears as case-insensitive substring of that GT's Event.content. All 10 pairs PASS (mechanical check pre-verified at Step 3.5 and re-confirmed at audit-gate): (grandpa, grandpa_90th_birthday_tomorrow) PASS; (birthday, grandpa_90th_birthday_tomorrow) PASS; (flood, flash_flood_warning_overnight) PASS; (warning, flash_flood_warning_overnight) PASS; (database, datastore_replica_failover_p1) PASS; (failover, datastore_replica_failover_p1) PASS; (fall, aging_parent_fall_alert_emergency_pendant) PASS; (pendant, aging_parent_fall_alert_emergency_pendant) PASS; (property, property_tax_installment_due_today) PASS; (tax, property_tax_installment_due_today) PASS.
audit_gate_result.step_3a_evidence: Mechanical set-intersection of test_v22's 9 event_ids (grandpa_90th_birthday_tomorrow, flash_flood_warning_overnight, datastore_replica_failover_p1, aging_parent_fall_alert_emergency_pendant, property_tax_installment_due_today, sneakers_wishlist_back_in_stock_email, calendar_coffee_lisa_weekly_suggest, pickup_basketball_saturday_open, chrome_extension_marketplace_update) vs 136 banned event_ids in runs/data/21c-banned-list-pre-c2.txt: 0 collisions.
audit_gate_result.step_3b_evidence: Per-GT hand-audit against 77 banned themes; 5 GT themes pass with distinguishing qualifiers documented. GT 1 grandpa_90th_birthday_tomorrow → V4 NEW YES family-milestone-with-social-cost subclass (NEW phrasing/event_id vs test_v8 mom_birthday_heads_up banned predecessor; subject grandpa vs mother, specific 90th milestone vs unspecified age, toast-at-cake-cutting obligation vs forgetting concern, Riverview Country Club venue vs unspecified). GT 2 flash_flood_warning_overnight → V2 EXISTING YES weather alert (NEW specific incident vs M8b generic 'weather alert' class-level placeholder; NWS authority, 4-6" overnight rain mechanism, I-5/Westlake commute-impact, distinct from M11a test_v14 boil-water-advisory water-quality-public-health). GT 3 datastore_replica_failover_p1 → V2 EXISTING YES production/on-call alert (NEW specific incident vs M8b generic 'production / server outage' class-level placeholder; PagerDuty primary-postgres-001 specific, SQLSTATE 08006 mechanism, SLO 12-min downtime, payments-data shard customer-facing impact). GT 4 aging_parent_fall_alert_emergency_pendant → V2 EXISTING YES urgent safety/medical-emergency (NEW sub-class vs M8b 'ER call' generic, vs M11a test_v12 hospitalized-friend informational-only, vs C1 gas_leak_kitchen_sensor different sub-class; medical-alert pendant fall-detection auto-EMS-dispatch with primary-contact-callback action demand). GT 5 property_tax_installment_due_today → V2 EXISTING YES financial/deadline obligation (NEW specific incident vs M8b 'rent due' generic, vs M10b test_v5 tax-extension IRS-side, vs M11a test_v12 DMV-license-renewal, vs M11a test_v13 warranty-registration, vs C1 student_loan_repayment_resume federal-student-loan; King County Treasurer county-level property-tax first-installment with 10% late penalty and day-31 certified collection notice).
audit_gate_result.step_3c_evidence: Mechanical set-intersection of test_v22's 5 GT keyword tuples ((grandpa, birthday), (flood, warning), (database, failover), (fall, pendant), (property, tax)) vs 76 banned tuples in runs/data/21c-banned-list-pre-c2.json: 0 bytewise collisions. Note (mother, birthday) banned but (grandpa, birthday) bytewise-distinct; (production, alert) banned but (database, failover) bytewise-distinct; (tax, expires) banned but (property, tax) bytewise-distinct.

gt_regime_classification.regime: discretionary-deadline obligation (V4 NEW YES, family-milestone-with-social-cost subclass)
gt_regime_classification.rationale: Proactive heads-up for grandfather's 90th milestone birthday party tomorrow with toast-at-cake-cutting obligation; all siblings + cousins committed/travelled; toast unwritten and expected. Maps 1:1 to V4 prompt's seventh YES class: 'discretionary-deadline obligation: a family milestone with social cost (birthday or anniversary heads-up)'.

NWS flash flood warning for King County with 4-6" overnight rain, low-lying I-5 corridor road closures expected, user's morning commute on Westlake Avenue in warning zone, I-405 alternate advised. Maps 1:1 to V4 prompt's fifth YES class: 'a weather alert or external condition that would plausibly change the user's planned day'.

PagerDuty P1 database failover on primary-postgres-001 with SQLSTATE 08006 write-failures; user is primary on-call for payments-data shard; SLO 12-min downtime if not resolved by 04:57; customer-facing checkout impacted. Maps 1:1 to V4 prompt's sixth YES class: 'a production/on-call alert or outage for a system the user owns'.

gt_regime_classification.regime: urgent safety/security issue (V2 EXISTING YES — medical-emergency sub-class)
gt_regime_classification.rationale: Medical-alert pendant for elderly father (Robert) triggered fall-detection at 6:42am with automatic EMS dispatch confirmed; user listed as primary emergency contact; pendant operator awaiting callback to coordinate hospital handoff; ambulance ETA 8 minutes. Maps 1:1 to V4 prompt's first YES class: 'an urgent safety or security issue (fire, break-in, medical emergency, security breach, unauthorized access)'.

King County Treasurer property-tax first-installment payment of $3,180 due today by 5pm; 10% late-payment penalty applies if missed; day-31 certified collection notice if not paid. Maps 1:1 to V4 prompt's third YES class: 'a financial or deadline obligation the user must act on within the next few days (bill due, rent due, report deadline, payment reminder)'.
